ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist conducting the session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the therapy */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of therapy session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forces" (
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each force record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the therapy session */,
  "assistive_force" REAL /* Assistive force applied during therapy */,
  "obstacle_force" REAL /* Magnitude of any obstacle force measured */,
  "therapist_constant_force" REAL /* Constant force from the therapist */,
  "patient_constant_force" REAL /* Constant force from the patient */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the force was recorded */,
  "force_description" TEXT /* Description of the force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forces_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_factors" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the therapy session */,
  "recovery_factor" REAL /* Recovery factor measured during therapy */,
  "assistance_level" INTEGER /* Level of assistance provided to the patient */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recovery factor was recorded */,
  "recovery_description" TEXT /* Description of the recovery factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_factors_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapists" (
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the therapist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the therapist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the therapist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the therapist */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the therapist */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the therapist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the patient has */,
  "primary_therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary therapist assigned to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id")
)
column_names: ID of the therapist conducting the session
ID of the patient receiving the therapy
Duration of the session in minutes
Additional notes or comments about the session
Location where the session took place
Unique identifier for each force record
